codeReview.summary: The fix directly addresses the prior blocking bug: structured parsing no longer deserializes concatenated display text, but instead walks canonical output_text content parts while preserving the existing refusal and strict tool-argument failure behavior.

summary: Reviewed the prior failed feature, the fix handoff/transcript, and both commit diffs (3d78df0 and 874fa87). The new helper at src/resources/responses.rs:2050-2095 parses canonical output_text parts instead of response.output_text(), and the regression at tests/responses_parse_contract.rs:104-132 demonstrates the original multi-block failure is fixed without regressing refusal or strict tool parsing.
